JasperTemplate.name: JasperReport_TestJRXML
JasperTemplate.DesignXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <jasperReport name="JasperReport_TestJRXML" pageWidth="842" pageHeight="595" orientation="Landscape" columnWidth="782" leftMargin="30" rightMargin="30" topMargin="20" bottomMargin="20" whenNoDataType="NoPages">
<style name="Header" fontName="Arial" fontSize="12" isBold="true" backcolor="#1A7182" forecolor="#FFFFFF" mode="Opaque"/> <style name="Detail" fontName="Arial" fontSize="10" mode="Transparent"/> <style name="DetailAlt" style="Detail" backcolor="#F5F5F5" mode="Opaque"/>
<parameter name="taskResultDataSource" class="net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRDataSource"/> <parameter name="TaskResultReport" class="net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JasperReport"/>
<field name="name" class="java.lang.String"/> <field name="employeeId" class="java.lang.String"/> <field name="email" class="java.lang.String"/> <field name="firstname" class="java.lang.String"/> <field name="lastname" class="java.lang.String"/>
<title> <band height="40"> <staticText> <reportElement x="0" y="10" width="782" height="30"/> <textElement textAlignment="Center"> <font size="16" isBold="true"/> </textElement> <text><![CDATA[Employee Report]]></text> </staticText> </band> </title>
<pageHeader> <band height="20"> <subreport isUsingCache="true"> <reportElement x="0" y="0" width="782" height="20"/> <dataSourceExpression><![CDATA[$P{taskResultDataSource}]]></dataSourceExpression> <subreportExpression><![CDATA[$P{TaskResultReport}]]></subreportExpression> </subreport> </band> </pageHeader>
<columnHeader> <band height="25"> <staticText> <reportElement style="Header" x="0" y="0" width="150" height="25"/> <text><![CDATA[Name]]></text> </staticText> <staticText> <reportElement style="Header" x="150" y="0" width="150" height="25"/> <text><![CDATA[Employee ID]]></text> </staticText> <staticText> <reportElement style="Header" x="300" y="0" width="150" height="25"/> <text><![CDATA[Email]]></text> </staticText> <staticText> <reportElement style="Header" x="450" y="0" width="150" height="25"/> <text><![CDATA[First Name]]></text> </staticText> <staticText> <reportElement style="Header" x="600" y="0" width="150" height="25"/> <text><![CDATA[Last Name]]></text> </staticText> </band> </columnHeader>
<detail> <band height="20"> <textField> <reportElement style="Detail" x="0" y="0" width="150" height="20"/> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA[$F{name}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> <textField> <reportElement style="Detail" x="150" y="0" width="150" height="20"/> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA[$F{employeeId}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> <textField> <reportElement style="Detail" x="300" y="0" width="150" height="20"/> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA[$F{email}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> <textField> <reportElement style="Detail" x="450" y="0" width="150" height="20"/> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA[$F{firstname}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> <textField> <reportElement style="Detail" x="600" y="0" width="150" height="20"/> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA[$F{lastname}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> </band> </detail>
<pageFooter> <band height="20"> <textField> <reportElement x="0" y="0" width="100" height="20"/> <textElement> <font size="10" isItalic="true"/> </textElement> <textFieldExpression><![CDATA["Page " + $V{PAGE_NUMBER}]]></textFieldExpression> </textField> </band> </pageFooter> </jasperReport>
